popularStory.headline: Raimond-Bérenger IV de Provence (1198-1245)
popularStory.description:
Raimond Bérenger IV ou V, né vers 1198, mort le 19 août 1245 à Aix, fut comte de Provence et de Forcalquier de 1209 à sa mort.

Numérotation

Lors de la minorité d'un précédent comte, la régence fut e …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV於1195年9月23日出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯時，他的父親Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence10歲，母親Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier15歲。他於1219年6月5日與Béatrice de Savoie在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1245年8月19日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV于1195年9月23日出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯时，他的父亲Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence10岁，母亲Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier15岁。他于1219年6月5日与Béatrice de Savoie在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1245年8月19日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Provence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Province   1, a cognate of 3 below. This surname is very rare in Britain.
Probably also an altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provance   1.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Province   3 and also 1 above.

variants.name: Province
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Provence   1 and   Provins   1.
Altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provins   2.
Americanized form of French   Provence   3.

nameMeanings.name: Raimond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from ragin ‘advice’ + mund ‘protector’. See Raymond .

variants.name: Reinmund
meanings: Variant of   Raimund .

variants.name: Reimund
meanings: Variant of   Raimund .

nameMeanings.name: Berenger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Bérenger): variant of Béringer (see Beringer ).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beringer
meanings: German; French (Béringer): from the ancient Germanic personal name Beringari, Beringer, composed of the elements bern ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’. Compare French Belanger and Berenger .
German: habitational name for someone from any of several paces called Behringen or Böhringen in Baden-Württemberg and Bayern. Compare   Baringer  ,   Behringer  ,   Berringer  , and   Boehringer  .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Berringer  .

variants.name: Berenguer
meanings: Spanish and French (southern; Bérenguer): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements ber ‘bear’ + ger ‘spear’, a cognate of French Bérenger (see Berenger ) and Béringer (see Beringer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV was born on 23 September 1195, in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, his father, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, was 10 and his mother, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, was 15. He married Béatrice de Savoie on 5 June 1219, in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 19 August 1245, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV est né le 23 septembre 1195, à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Béatrice de Savoie le 5 juin 1219, à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 19 août 1245, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV am 23. September 1195 in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence 10 und seine Mutter Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier 15. Er hat am 5. Juni 1219 in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Béatrice de Savoie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 19. August 1245 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV è nato il il 23 settembre 1195 nel Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, il suo padre, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, aveva 10 anni e il suo madre, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Béatrice de Savoie il 5 giugno 1219, nel Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 19 agosto 1245, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IVが1195年9月23日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンエイクス-エン-プローベンスで生まれた時，父Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provenceは10歳，母Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquierは15歳であった。1219年6月5日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンエイクス-エン-プローベンスでBéatrice de Savoieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1245年8月19日に故郷で49歳で死去し，フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV(이)가 1195년 9월 23일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--프로븐스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence(은)는 10세였고, 그의 어머니 Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1219년 6월 5일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--프로븐스에서 Béatrice de Savoie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1245년 8월 19일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 플로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니에 묻혔다.

mn.23 September 1195–19 August 1245: 1195 оны Есдүгээр сарын 23–1245 оны Наймдугаар сарын 19

pt.23 September 1195–19 August 1245: 23 de setembro de 1195–19 de agosto de 1245
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV nasceu em 23 de setembro de 1195, em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrice de Savoie em 5 de junho de 1219, em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1245, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV родился 23 сентября 1195 г. в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, его отцу по имени Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrice de Savoie 5 июня 1219 г. в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 19 августа 1245 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция.

es.23 September 1195–19 August 1245: 23 de septiembre de 1195–19 de agosto de 1245
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV nació el 23 de septiembre de 1195, en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence, tenía 10 años y su mamá, Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Béatrice de Savoie el 5 de junio de 1219, en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1245, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.
